Class RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.redis.cache.semantic.autoconfigure.RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration
@AutoConfiguration @ConditionalOnClass({DefaultSemanticCache.class,redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient.class,CallAdvisor.class,StreamAdvisor.class,TransformersEmbeddingModel.class}) @EnableConfigurationProperties(RedisSemanticCacheProperties.class) @ConditionalOnProperty(name="spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.semantic-cache.enabled", havingValue="true", matchIfMissing=true) public class RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration extends Object
Auto-configuration for Redis semantic cache.
Author:
Brian Sam-Bodden, Eddú Meléndez, Yanming Zhou

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient
    jedisClient(org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory jedisConnectionFactory)
    Creates a RedisClient client for Redis connections, honoring the SSL, password, client name, and timeout settings from the JedisConnectionFactory.
    SemanticCache
    semanticCache(redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient jedisClient, EmbeddingModel embeddingModel, RedisSemanticCacheProperties properties)
    Creates the semantic cache instance.
    SemanticCacheAdvisor
    semanticCacheAdvisor(SemanticCache semanticCache)
    Creates the semantic cache advisor for ChatClient integration.
    EmbeddingModel
    semanticCacheEmbeddingModel()
    Provides a default EmbeddingModel using the redis/langcache-embed-v1 model.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration

      public RedisSemanticCacheAutoConfiguration()

  • Method Details

    • semanticCacheEmbeddingModel

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean(EmbeddingModel.class) @ConditionalOnClass(TransformersEmbeddingModel.class) public EmbeddingModel semanticCacheEmbeddingModel() throws Exception
      Provides a default EmbeddingModel using the redis/langcache-embed-v1 model. This model is specifically designed for semantic caching and provides 768-dimensional embeddings. It matches the default model used by RedisVL Python library.
      Returns:
      the embedding model for semantic caching
      Throws:
      Exception - if model initialization fails

    • jedisClient

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean @ConditionalOnBean(EmbeddingModel.class) public redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient jedisClient(org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis.JedisConnectionFactory jedisConnectionFactory)
      Creates a RedisClient client for Redis connections, honoring the SSL, password, client name, and timeout settings from the JedisConnectionFactory.
      Parameters:
      jedisConnectionFactory - the Jedis connection factory
      Returns:
      the RedisClient client

    • semanticCache

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean @ConditionalOnBean(EmbeddingModel.class) public SemanticCache semanticCache(redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient jedisClient, EmbeddingModel embeddingModel, RedisSemanticCacheProperties properties)
      Creates the semantic cache instance.
      Parameters:
      jedisClient - the Jedis client
      embeddingModel - the embedding model
      properties - the semantic cache properties
      Returns:
      the configured semantic cache

    • semanticCacheAdvisor

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean @ConditionalOnBean(SemanticCache.class) public SemanticCacheAdvisor semanticCacheAdvisor(SemanticCache semanticCache)
      Creates the semantic cache advisor for ChatClient integration.
      Parameters:
      semanticCache - the semantic cache
      Returns:
      the semantic cache advisor
